import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
for i in range\(1,5\):
    with open\(f'.tmp/agent_group_{i}.json','r',encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        data = json.load\(f\)
    print\(f'--- Group {i} \({len\(data\)} videos\) ---'\)
    for v in data:
        print\(f\\"  {v['video_id']}: {v['title'][:60]} [{v.get\('method','?'\)}]\\"\)
")

Bash(cd C:/Users/udawon/project/how-to-claude && python -c "
import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

targets = ['r6_1LC26z2o', 'fdhSq57nVv8', 'Wiwtpp8d81Q', 'jieedeI7Ruc', 'KIZQ6W_X8Ks', 'QqeDrJkBgsc', 'C0fNUdjQxeY', 'chyqSmimrRY']

for g in range\(1,5\):
    with open\(f'.tmp/agent_group_{g}.json','r',encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        data = json.load\(f\)
    for v in data:
        if v['video_id'] in targets:
            text = v.get\('text',''\)[:3500]
            print\(f'=== {v[\\"video_id\\"]}: {v[\\"title\\"]} \({v[\\"channel\\"]}\) ==='\)
            print\(f'Method: {v[\\"method\\"]} | Duration: {v.get\(\\"duration\\",\\"?\\"\)} | Views: {v.get\(\\"view_count\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\)
            print\(text[:3000]\)
            print\('---END---'\)
            print\(\)
")

Bash(cd C:/Users/udawon/project/how-to-claude && python -c "
from googleapiclient.discovery import build
import os, json
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
api_key = os.getenv\('YOUTUBE_API_KEY'\)
youtube = build\('youtube', 'v3', developerKey=api_key\)
resp = youtube.videos\(\).list\(part='snippet,contentDetails,statistics', id='Ii99RU3mOJM'\).execute\(\)
if resp['items']:
    item = resp['items'][0]
    print\(json.dumps\({
        'title': item['snippet']['title'],
        'channel': item['snippet']['channelTitle'],
        'description': item['snippet']['description'][:1000],
        'duration': item['contentDetails']['duration'],
        'viewCount': item['statistics'].get\('viewCount','N/A'\),
        'publishedAt': item['snippet']['publishedAt']
    }, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)
else:
    print\('Video not found'\)
" 2>&1)
